rationale: The citing paper references Barasz et al. (2016) only in grouped citations to support broad background points about gift-giving motives and preference prediction/misprediction. It does not discuss that paper's specific dissimilarity-based mechanism, nor does it reuse its design, measures, or findings in a distinct way when developing hypotheses or the Bayesian model. The core contribution is framed around adding price signaling and uncertainty effects, with Barasz et al. serving as general prior literature rather than a specific building block.
